name: Entegris, Inc.
description: Entegris, Inc. is a leading supplier of advanced materials and process solutions for the semiconductor and other high-technology industries. The company specializes in products and systems that purify, protect, and transport critical materials used in the semiconductor manufacturing process. Entegris operates through three primary segments: Specialty Chemicals and Engineered Materials, Microcontamination Control, and Advanced Planarization Solutions, helping customers improve yield, reliability, and performance in their manufacturing processes.
